<!--
Thanks for the PR! A few things to make review easier:
- Link the issue this PR resolves
- Keep the diff focused
- Add or update tests for any behavior change
- Use a Conventional Commit prefix in the PR title (feat:, fix:, docs:, refactor:, perf:, test:, ci:, chore:)
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? Why? -->

## Linked issues

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / internal
- [ ] CI / build / chore

## How was this tested?

<!-- Describe the tests you ran. Include commands. -->

```bash
npm run lint
npm run build
npm test
```

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style of this project (`.prettierrc.json`, `.editorconfig`)
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] I have updated the README / docs if behavior changed
- [ ] I have not committed secrets or `.env` files
- [ ] The PR title uses a Conventional Commit prefix
